title: RNA-seq of GBM-PTEN
author: Liu, Zeming
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains the RNA-seq data generated from GBM-PTEN organoid experiments.  
 Further codes for the GBM-PTEN model are available at  https://github.com/SunXQlab/GBM-PTEN .
steps_raw:
This dataset contains the RNA-seq data generated from GBM-PTEN organoid experiments.  
 Further codes for the GBM-PTEN model are available at  https://github.com/SunXQlab/GBM-PTEN .
